name: frontend-kit
description: Frontend plugin for separating React-facing artifacts into system, design, and domain axes.

interface.shortDescription: Axis-based React architecture guidance for system, design, and domain separation.
interface.longDescription: Helps Codex classify React-facing artifacts by system, design, and domain axes, preserve dependency direction, and choose implementation versus refactor order for frontend structure work.
defaultPrompt: Classify this React feature into system, design, and domain concerns and propose a better structure.
Rewrite this component and hook boundary so system, design, and domain responsibilities stop leaking into each other.
Decide the implementation order and cleanup order for this React-facing feature.
